project_variables.manga_name: Soul Land: Legend of The Gods' Realm

master_blueprint.objective: Build a high-performance, SEO-optimized, and immersive Manga Reader platform using SvelteKit 5.

features: Chapter jump dropdown with 'Click Outside' to close logic

ui_ux_design.theme: Dark 'Void' palette with vibrant neon accents
effects: Animated Hero Title with glow/flicker effects
Background Electric/Lightning Arc animations using SVG paths
Glassmorphism overlays for navigation and menus
Micro-interactions (scaling on click, glowing on hover)

seo_strategy: Dynamic Sitemap.xml generator (automatically mapping all chapters from JSON)
Page-specific meta tags (Open Graph, Twitter, Canonical)
optimization: Static Site Generation (SSG) for instant page loads
Minimal client-side JavaScript for the core reader

master_blueprint.implementation_instructions: 1. Initialize SvelteKit 5 with adapter-static. 2. Define global CSS variables based on the project_variables. 3. Structure the chapter data in a central JSON file. 4. Implement a dynamic route [slug] for chapters. 5. Set up the sitemap.xml server route to pull from the JSON data. 6. Build the 'Load More' pagination logic for the homepage. 7. Use the 'Void' design language: High blur, high contrast, deep shadows.
